relabelled_senses.definition: Genuine or authentic when qualifying a noun (equivalent to 'real' as opposed to imitation or false).
Occasionally; from time to time; at intervals but not regularly or frequently.
Describing a place, person, activity, or situation characterized by moral corruption, illicit or immoral behavior, debauchery, or criminality.
By spoken word; orally rather than in writing.
Kept under the strictest security or secrecy; carefully safeguarded or hidden from access or disclosure.
To make no comment; to remain silent; to decline to speak or to refuse to take responsibility for a statement.
To move away from an area of strong or unfavorable winds; to leave windy conditions behind, especially in a maritime context.
To write freely and without restraint; to let one’s pen flow in continuous, spontaneous writing.
To set aside temporarily or permanently; to put something to one side physically or mentally.
To stop bothering, disturbing, or annoying someone; to leave someone alone.
To fail to appear for an arranged meeting or date, leaving the other person waiting; to stand someone up.
To annul, rescind, or revoke an order, decision, law, contract, or official act so that it has no legal or practical effect.
To kill or render someone dead; to leave someone stiff and motionless.
To entrust a matter or outcome to God or divine providence; to leave a situation in God's hands.
An imperative or exhortation meaning 'stop the nonsense' or 'cut the crap'; used to demand that someone cease wasting time, joking, or behaving foolishly.
To omit or leave out something when speaking or writing, either accidentally or deliberately.
To allow oneself to be loved or to accept affection from others.
Very old or antiquated; dating from a long time ago.
Very old or long-standing; originating from a distant past.
Extremely old or antiquated; from a very long time ago.
